mapper.select: SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, inventory_kg AS inventoryKg FROM fuel_inventory ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, inventory_kg AS inventoryKg FROM fuel_inventory WHERE YEAR(record_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(record_date) = #{month} ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT id, record_date AS recordDate, inventory_kg AS inventoryKg FROM fuel_inventory WHERE record_date < #{recordDate} ORDER BY record_date DESC LIMIT 1
